title: Implement URL Shortener REST API with In-Memory Storage

steps.description: Define core business logic and data structures related to URLs, including URL entity and value objects.
steps.done_condition: Core URL business logic implemented and unit tests passing.

steps.description: Define interfaces for the service and repository to interact with the domain logic.
steps.done_condition: Service and repository interfaces defined and unit tests passing.

steps.description: Implement the in-memory repository for URL mapping based on defined interfaces.
steps.done_condition: In-memory repository implemented and integrated with unit tests.

steps.description: Implement the HTTP handler for RESTful API endpoints to expose URL shortener functionality.
steps.done_condition: HTTP handlers implemented and passing integration tests.

steps.description: Conduct integration testing to validate the complete URL shortener REST API functionality.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests executed successfully, ensuring the API works end-to-end.

mergeOrder: Merge domain and ports first, followed by secondary and primary adapters, and finally integration tests.

riskRegister.mitigation: Plan for future enhancements to incorporate persistent storage.

successCriteria: All defined API endpoints functional and passing tests.
Substantial unit and integration test coverage achieved.
